cluster_title: Technical deep dive on RLHF precision mismatch
core_facts: ["Thomas Wolf and Amine Dirhoussi present a deep dive into a numerical precision issue in RLHF when training in FP32 and inference in BF16. They decompose the importance sampling ratio into policy change and precision gap, finding that the precision gap is structured and correlated with advantage, but disabling clipping resolves the issue."]
